modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer shuts down with Fan Detection Error on startup.

full_description_text: User experiences shutdown of desktop computer. Upon restarting, an error appears. The error indicates a problem with fan detection, specifically the CPU fan. This issue may affect system performance and stability.
short_description: Computer shuts down with Fan Detection Error on startup.
description: User experiences shutdown of desktop computer. Upon restarting, an error appears. The error indicates a problem with fan detection, specifically the CPU fan. This issue may affect system performance and stability.
